doc:
BLOCKED -- needs mpz/bigint integration ADR (bd mpfr-ts-3a9). Returns f as z * 2^e via the mpz output and exp return value. C mutates an out-param mpz; natural TS is to return { z: bigint, e: bigint } as a value tuple. Same blocker family as mpfr_set_z_2exp and mpfr_add_z. Unblock condition: ADR on mpz/bigint surface design.

Note: per [[mpfr-storage-traps]] in agent memory, `mpfr_get_z_2exp` is already understood to be de-padding (NaN drops prec on the TS side; exp_ts = exp_2 + prec). When the ADR lands and this port ships, those traps will inform the implementation.
refs: src/core.ts -- bigint is the natural TS analog of mpz_t.
